prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: hero poster. Story world: Static Between Stations. Premise: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices.. Setting: Abandoned commuter rail control annex. Threat presence: The Curator of Static. Recurring motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.. Subgenre: psychological horror. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Static Between Stations Story Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
source_prompt: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes.
